notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Christian Yelich singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Henry Bolte. Garrett Mitchell scores. David Hamilton to 3rd. Christian Yelich to 2nd. Fielding error by center fielder Henry Bolte.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom reaches on a throwing error by first baseman Jake Bauers.
